---
title: "Last Heartsease Leaves. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Last Heartsease Leaves. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1862
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Booklet

**Publisher:** 500 printed privately for sale for a charity.

### Notes

Reprinted as “Lost Heartsease Leaves” in last number of <i>Events of the Month, </i>Jan 2, 1865, pp. 615-618. The letters from Keble reprinted in <i>Musings over the Christian Year</i> make it clear that this was originally written as the ending of <i>Heartsease</i>, and was not an afterthought.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
